rationale: The proposed change is a statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b), not an agency rule. Gov't Code §2001.024 governs administrative rulemaking notice procedures and does not constrain legislative changes to exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 2001.024. CONTENT OF NOTICE. (a) The notice of a proposed rule must include:
_note: No conflict. The cited rule addresses agency rulemaking notice content; the proposed change is a statutory amendment to a tax exemption amount set by the Legislature, not an agency rule.
